{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Council of Moongrave
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Council of Moongrave]] is a group within the city.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8">''Dreadgod'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
